chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 336 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.1595/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.1542/2025 (U/A) 3. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 4. For orders on CMA No.1543/2025 (Ex.A) 5. For orders on CMA No.1544/2025 (S/A) 6. For hearing of main case 17.03.2025 Mr. Najamuddin Dharejo, Advocate for the Petitioners >>>>>..<<<<< The petitioners have approached the Superintending Engineer / Chairman Complaint Redressal Committee, Works and Services Department, District Khairpur vide Letter / Application dated 05.03.202 (available at page-37 Annexure “D”), same has not been decided and is pending. Since the petitioners have already approached the department and such complaint of the petitioners is already pending before the Complaint Redressal Committee, as such the petitioners without waiting for its final decision have approached this Court by filing the present petition, hence, the Petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed in limine along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
